# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Empowering families with autism support services, safety resources, and life-saving programs. Get expert guidance to help your child thrive today.

### Resources
https://example.com/resources
Access trusted autism resources including educational materials, therapy guides, and community support tools designed to help families navigate every challenge.

### Programs & Safety
https://example.com/programs-safety
Protect your loved one with proven autism safety resources and wandering prevention programs. Discover tools, training, and emergency response solutions now.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Need help navigating autism services? Reach out to our compassionate team for personalized guidance, program information, and family support resources.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
